title: Ruined MCLive Early
description: A set of goofy and wild features based on fan comments to ruin Minecraft Live
body:
# I Ruined Minecraft Live Early...
### Genuinely one of the most insane mods I've ever created.

Welcome to the mod that'll ruin Minecraft Live early. These features are entirely based on viewer comments and my own dumb ideas.

### Check out the original video for this mod here: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3Lu_Rp3ewQk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Here are the features included in the mod:
- Copper Saxophones (Craftable)
- Trapped Copper Chests (Load up more TNT and see what happens)
- Mooblooms (Don't let too many of them loose on a field)
- Beginning Dimension
  - Old Bricks & Old Cobblestone spawn underground
  - Portal built from Old Bricks
  - Portal lighting tool crafted from Old Cobblestone
- Fireflies (definitely what you think)
- Amethyst armor & tools
- Amethyst Bricks (Including stairs, slabs, & walls)
- The Death Star blows everything up around Midnight (you can turn it off with a gamerule)
- Elder Ghast (Happy Ghasts get old after 2 hours now)
- Happy Creepers (Pet them and they'll come back when you sleep)
